steps.expected: Page loads with album data displayed
steps.observed: Page loaded successfully with album 'Folge 136: und das versunkene Dorf' displayed
Initial state shows emerald dot (bg-emerald-500) with 'Ready · 239 valid albums' text

steps.expected: Refresh triggered, status indicator changes to running state
steps.observed: After clicking refresh, status changed to amber dot (bg-amber-500) with 'Refreshing catalog · 40/240 · 239 valid albums' text and spinning animation

steps.expected: Amber dot visible, refresh icon spinning, progress text shown
steps.observed: Screenshot captured showing amber dot, animate-spin class present, progress text 'Refreshing catalog · 157/240' displayed

steps.expected: Status returns to emerald dot with 'Ready' text
steps.observed: After ~22 seconds, status returned to emerald dot (bg-emerald-500) with 'Ready · 239 valid albums' text, spinning animation stopped
Screenshot captured showing emerald dot with 'Ready · 239 valid albums' text

steps.expected: No console errors related to refresh functionality
steps.observed: Multiple 500 errors found in console (unrelated to refresh UI - appear to be pre-existing backend/API issues)

evidence.consoleErrors: 7 xFailed to load resource: 500 Internal Server Error (pre-existing backend issues, not related to refresh UI functionality)
evidence.network: Multiple GET requests to /api/admin/catalog/status for status polling during refresh (as expected)

summary: Tested VAL-CROSS-008: Catalog Refresh Status Updates. Assertion PASSED. Status indicator correctly transitions from emerald dot (Ready) to amber dot with spinning animation (Refreshing) and back to emerald dot (Ready) after refresh completes. Network polling for status updates observed as expected. Console errors (500s) are unrelated to the refresh UI functionality - they appear to be pre-existing backend issues.
